summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MyBase iteration 5 features: Portfolio Advanced (transactions, snapshots, evolution charts), Storage Usage in sidebar, and Mindmap edge rendering fix verification. Backend 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend all flows working correctly.

issues: Recharts warning: chart width/height -1 on initial load. Non-blocking, charts render correctly after component mounts.

passed_tests: Auth: Login with test2@test.com / test123
Storage API: GET /api/storage/usage returns correct format (user_file_count, total_disk_mb, total_disk_files)
Storage UI: Sidebar shows storage info '0 Mo (0 fichiers)' with data-testid='storage-info'
Portfolio Assets: Create crypto asset (Bitcoin, BTC, qty=1, price=50000)
Portfolio Assets: Get all assets, filter by type
Portfolio Assets: Update asset current_price
Portfolio Assets: Delete asset
Portfolio Transactions: Create buy transaction (updates asset quantity)
Portfolio Transactions: Create sell transaction
Portfolio Transactions: Get all transactions, filter by asset_id
Portfolio Transactions: Delete transaction
Portfolio Transactions: Handles invalid asset_id (404)
Portfolio Snapshots: Create snapshot (captures total_value by type)
Portfolio Snapshots: Get snapshots with months filter
Portfolio Page UI: 4 tabs working (Actifs, Graphiques, Évolution, Transactions)
Portfolio Page UI: Stats cards showing Total investi, Valeur actuelle, Gain/Perte, Performance
Portfolio Page UI: Type filter dropdown (Tous les types, Crypto, etc.)
Portfolio Page UI: Allocation pie chart visible in Charts tab
Portfolio Page UI: Transaction dialog with asset selection, type (Achat/Vente), quantity, price
Portfolio Page UI: Transactions tab shows list with badges (Achat/Vente)
Dashboard: Portfolio stats displayed (Investi, Valeur actuelle, Gain/Perte)
Mindmap: Edges now render correctly (27 éléments, 10 connexions visible)
Mindmap: React Flow Handle components working (no more 'null handle' warnings)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during backend and frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 5 (Portfolio Advanced with transactions/snapshots/charts tabs, Storage usage display, Mindmap edge fix) are fully functional. Storage info shows in sidebar when not collapsed. Portfolio page has 4 tabs: Actifs (asset cards with P&L), Graphiques (pie + bar charts), Évolution (area chart from snapshots), Transactions (buy/sell history). Previous iterations features (Tags, Custom Types, Sub-projects, Mind Map) continue to work correctly. French language interface throughout.

storage_usage.api: GET /api/storage/usage - returns user_file_count, user_size_mb, total_disk_mb, total_disk_files
storage_usage.ui: Sidebar shows HardDrive icon with 'X Mo (Y fichiers)' text

api.create: POST /api/portfolio/transactions - creates tx and updates asset quantity

portfolio_transactions.ui: Transaction dialog, Transactions tab with badges (Achat green, Vente red)

api.create: POST /api/portfolio/snapshots - captures total_value and by_type breakdown

portfolio_snapshots.ui: Snapshot button, Évolution tab with area chart

portfolio_tabs.actifs: Asset cards with quantity, PRU, current price, P&L percentage
portfolio_tabs.graphiques: Allocation pie chart + Invested vs Current bar chart
portfolio_tabs.evolution: Area chart from snapshots (needs 2+ snapshots for display)
portfolio_tabs.transactions: List of all transactions with asset name, type, quantity, total

features_verified.mindmap_fix: React Flow edges now render correctly - Handle components added to CustomNode
